text: Each crane supplier must ensure that all of its cranes have been thoroughly inspected and certified as safe in accordance with applicable regulations and industry standards.  Additionally, crane suppliers must have all cranes inspected and certified by a qualified 3 rd  party inspection firm at least annually, and evidence of the inspection must be always retained on the crane and provided to GS Mountain. All crane operators must be certified to operate the specific crane and such certificate shall be provided to GS Mountain. Helicopter's used for hoisting will require a hoist plan, and coordination with the Regional Safety Manager. All cranes requiring assembly, on GS Mountain Self-Perform or ThirdParty projects, require a preconstruction meeting two weeks prior to assembly. The meeting requires the attendance of an authorized GS Mountain Safety Department attendee. The assembly plan must be reviewed and approved before assembly is to commence.
